description: Look stylish in these black leather shoes from red tape. These dressy shoes are designed for comfort and reference the moccasin in their upper. They'll look great when teamed with fomal pants and shirts. Upper High quality leather upper for comfort and durability with slip-on styling Stitch detail at the seams of the to box Overlay at the heel Structured, removable sockliner Brand badge at the lateral side of the heel Outsole stitched to the upper Cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Outsole Outsole with geometrical lugs for better grip Slightly elevated heel for ergonomic comfort Curved outsole shoe care Wipe dust using a dry, clean cloth Use a branded shoe polish to keep your leather footwear clean and shiny Do not store in direct sunlight
